channel.title: DevCheap â€” Verified Developer Deals
channel.description: Curated verified deals, free credits, and lifetime discounts on developer tools. Updated weekly.

item.title: Aiven â€” Free Tier (Postgres, MySQL, Redis)
item.description: Save $100+/mo on managed Postgres, MySQL, Redis — free tier covers dev and staging Managed open-source databases including Postgres, MySQL, Redis, Kafka, and more.

item.title: Algolia â€” Free Tier (10,000 Records)
item.description: Free 10K records with typo-tolerant search saves startups $50/mo Hosted search API with typo-tolerance, faceting, and analytics. Free for 10K records.

item.title: Auth0 â€” Free for 7,000 MAUs
item.description: Free for 7K MAUs — saves $30/mo vs. Auth0 Pro plan Authentication and authorization platform with social login, MFA, and free tier for 7,000 active users.

item.title: Backblaze B2 â€” 10GB Free Storage
item.description: 10GB free S3 storage — cheaper than AWS for data egress S3-compatible cloud object storage with 10GB free and affordable egress pricing.

item.title: Better Stack â€” Free Uptime Monitoring (100GB)
item.description: Free uptime monitoring with 100GB logs — saves $20/mo over Datadog Uptime monitoring, log management, and status pages with generous free tier.

item.title: Checkly â€” 20% Off Annual Plan
item.description: 20% off annual plan — saves $60+/year on Playwright-based monitoring Synthetic monitoring for APIs and browser apps. Uptime checks, Playwright-based browser checks, and alerting.

item.title: Clerk â€” Free for 10,000 MAUs
item.description: Free for 10K MAUs — saves $25/mo vs. Clerk Pro Authentication and user management for Next.js, React, and web apps.

item.title: ClickUp â€” 20% Off Workspace Plans
item.description: 20% off workspaces — saves $100+/year on project management All-in-one productivity platform with docs, sprints, goals, and AI-powered project management.

item.title: Cloudflare â€” Free Tier (CDN, Workers, Pages)
item.description: Free CDN + Workers + Pages + D1 + R2 — saves $200+/mo vs. AWS Free CDN, DDoS protection, serverless Workers, Pages hosting, D1 database, and R2 storage.

item.title: Cron-Job.org â€” Free Cron Jobs
item.description: Free cron scheduling — replaces costly cloud scheduler services Free cron job service for scheduling tasks and running scripts.

item.title: Datadog â€” 14-day Free Trial + $100 Credits
item.description: $100 credits + 14-day trial — test full APM suite for free Monitor infrastructure, logs, and applications with 14-day free trial.

item.title: DigitalOcean â€” $200 Free Credits (60 days)
item.description: $200 free credits — deploy VMs and K8s clusters to test before paying Deploy VMs, databases, Kubernetes, and serverless functions. $200 credits for 60 days.

item.title: Fly.io â€” $10/month Free Credits
item.description: $10/mo free credits — deploy globally with Docker at no cost Deploy full-stack apps globally with Docker. $10/month free credits.

item.title: GitHub â€” Free for Public Repos
item.description: Free public repos with unlimited CI/CD minutes via Actions Free source code hosting with CI/CD, Pages, and Actions for public repositories.

item.title: GitLab â€” Free DevOps Platform
item.description: Complete free DevOps platform with built-in CI/CD and container registry Free DevOps platform with Git repos, CI/CD, container registry, and project management.

item.title: Gitpod â€” Free for 50 hours/month
item.description: 50 free hours/month of cloud dev environments — no local setup needed Cloud development environments that spin up instantly from any Git repository.

item.title: Hetzner Cloud â€” €20 Cloud Credit for New Users
item.description: EUR 20 cloud credit — high-performance VPS at 60% less than AWS European cloud provider with affordable VPS, dedicated servers, and storage. €20 credit for new accounts.

item.title: Hoppscotch â€” Free & Open Source
item.description: Free open-source API testing — Postman alternative with zero cost Open-source API development platform for testing REST, GraphQL, and WebSocket APIs.

item.title: Hostinger â€” 80% OFF Web Hosting Plans
item.description: 80% off hosting — shared plans start at $2/mo for developers on a budget Budget-friendly hosting with shared, VPS, and cloud plans. Includes free SSL, domain, and 24/7 support.

item.title: HubSpot â€” Free CRM + $1,000 Startup Credits
item.description: Free CRM + $1,000 startup credits — enterprise sales tools for free CRM, marketing automation, and sales tools with generous startup program credits.

item.title: IONOS â€” 93% OFF All Hosting Plans + Free Domain
item.description: 93% off hosting + free domain — cheapest entry point for new projects Web hosting, domains, VPS, and cloud solutions from a global provider. Deep discounts on hosting plans.

item.title: Koyeb â€” Free Tier for Web Services
item.description: Free serverless hosting with global edge deploys Serverless hosting platform with global deployment, Docker containers, and free tier.

item.title: Linear â€” Free for Open Source
item.description: Free per-user vs. $10/mo on Jira (standard) Issue tracking and project management for software teams.

item.title: Linode (Akamai) â€” $100 Free Credit for New Accounts
item.description: $100 free credit — high-performance VMs at competitive pricing Developer-friendly cloud hosting with high-performance compute instances, GPU, and global data centers.

item.title: MinIO â€” Free & Open Source
item.description: Free S3-compatible storage — self-hosted alternative to AWS S3 at zero cost Open-source S3-compatible object storage for on-premise and hybrid cloud deployments.

item.title: MongoDB â€” $0/month Free Tier
item.description: Free 512MB Atlas tier — perfect for prototyping and small apps Document database with free tier for up to 512MB storage.

item.title: Namecheap â€” Up to 50% Off Domains & Hosting
item.description: 50% off domains + free WHOIS privacy — saves $10+/domain/year Register domains and get 50% off hosting plans. Free WHOIS privacy included.

item.title: Neon â€” $15/month Free Tier
item.description: Free $15/mo Postgres with branching — instant database branching for dev workflows Serverless Postgres with branching, instant provisioning, and generous free tier.

item.title: ngrok â€” Free Tunnel (4 endpoints)
item.description: Free secure tunnels — expose localhost for testing webhooks without deploying Expose local servers to the internet securely with free tunnels.

item.title: Notion â€” Team Plan Trial + Bonus Credits
item.description: Free team plan trial — all-in-one docs and project management All-in-one workspace for docs, wikis, databases, and project management with AI features.

item.title: Nx â€” Free & Open Source
item.description: Free open-source monorepo tool — enterprise build caching at no cost Monorepo build system with intelligent code generation, caching, and dependency graph analysis.

item.title: PlanetScale â€” Free Tier (10GB)
item.description: Free 10GB MySQL-compatible database with branching — $30/mo value Serverless MySQL-compatible database with branching and deploy requests.

item.title: PocketBase â€” Free & Open Source
item.description: Free open-source backend — SQLite, auth, file storage, realtime in one binary Open-source backend with realtime database, auth, and file storage.

item.title: Postmark â€” 1,000 Emails Free
item.description: 1,000 free transactional emails/month — reliable delivery for startups Transactional email service with 1,000 free emails per month.

item.title: Railway â€” $5/month Free Credits
item.description: $5/mo free credits — instant full-stack deploys with databases included Full-stack hosting with instant deploys, databases, and monitoring. $5 free credits monthly.

item.title: Redis Cloud â€” Free 30MB Tier
item.description: Free 30MB managed Redis — caching and pub/sub for small projects Managed Redis database with caching, pub/sub, and vector search. Free 30MB tier.

item.title: Render â€” $5/month Free Tier
item.description: Free $5/mo tier — deploy web services and databases with zero config Deploy web services, databases, and background workers for free.

item.title: Resend â€” $25/month Free Credits
item.description: $25/mo free email credits — modern email API with great developer experience Email API for developers with generous free tier and pay-as-you-go pricing.

item.title: Scaleway â€” €20 Cloud Credits for New Users
item.description: EUR 20 cloud credits — European cloud at a fraction of Big 3 prices European cloud provider with VMs, Kubernetes, object storage, and serverless functions.

item.title: Sentry â€” $100/month Free for Startups
item.description: $100/mo free for startups — error monitoring without the enterprise price tag Error monitoring and performance tracking for web and mobile apps.

item.title: SiteGround â€” 75% OFF Web Hosting Plans
item.description: 75% off managed hosting — optimized WordPress with top-rated support Premium web hosting with managed WordPress, WooCommerce, and cloud hosting solutions.

item.title: Snyk â€” Free for Open Source
item.description: Free open-source dependency scanning — catch vulnerabilities before they ship Developer security platform for finding and fixing vulnerabilities in dependencies.

item.title: Stripe â€” $100 Free Processing Credits
item.description: $100 free processing — test payment infrastructure at scale for free Accept payments, send payouts, and manage subscriptions globally.

item.title: Supabase â€” Free Tier (2 Projects)
item.description: Free Postgres with auth, realtime, and edge functions — Firebase alternative Hosted Postgres database with authentication, instant APIs, edge functions.

item.title: Turso â€” Free Tier (3GB)
item.description: Free 3GB edge SQLite — global read replicas without the complexity Edge SQLite database for global applications with generous free tier.

item.title: Twilio â€” $15 Free API Credit
item.description: $15 free API credit — test SMS, voice, email APIs before committing Cloud communications platform for SMS, voice, video, email (SendGrid), and authentication APIs.

item.title: Upstash â€” Free Tier (10,000 Requests)
item.description: Free 10K requests/day serverless Redis — built for edge and serverless Serverless Redis and Kafka for edge applications.

item.title: Vercel â€” $10/month Hobby Plan Free (3 months)
item.description: $10/mo free for 3 months — deploy Next.js apps with instant CI/CD Deploy frontend apps with automatic CI/CD. Free Hobby plan for 3 months.

item.title: Vultr â€” $100 Free Credit (New Customers)
item.description: $100 free credit — deploy bare metal or GPU instances to evaluate performance Global cloud infrastructure with bare metal, GPU instances, object storage, and 33 data center regions.

item.title: TidyCal â€” Lifetime License - $29
item.description: Pay $29 once vs. $12/mo for Calendly — breaks even in 3 months Alternative to Calendly with unlimited booking types, calendar integrations, and payment collection.

item.title: SiteGuru â€” Lifetime License - $79
item.description: Pay $79 once vs. $30/mo for SEMrush — lifetime SEO audits at 80% off SEO audit tool that crawls your website and provides actionable recommendations for better rankings.

item.title: FuseBase â€” Lifetime License - $79
item.description: Pay $79 once vs. $50/mo for Monday.com — client portal + CRM for life Client portal and collaboration hub with project management, document sharing, and CRM features.

item.title: Emailit â€” Lifetime License - $49
item.description: Pay $49 once vs. $25/mo for SendGrid — transactional email with no monthly bill Email sending API with high deliverability, analytics, and scalable infrastructure for transactional mail.

item.title: Teable â€” Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $40/mo for Airtable — no-code apps without recurring fees AI-native no-code platform for building custom apps, CRMs, and project management systems.

item.title: SendFox â€” Lifetime License - $49
item.description: Pay $49 once vs. $30/mo for Mailchimp — email 5K subscribers forever Email marketing for content creators — unlimited emails to 5,000 subscribers with a one-time payment.

item.title: Writecream â€” Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $49/mo for Jasper — AI content at 90% less AI content writer with 40+ templates for blog posts, emails, ads, social media, and voiceovers.

item.title: WordHero â€” Lifetime License - $89
item.description: Pay $89 once vs. $79/mo for Copy.ai — 80+ AI writing tools for life AI writing assistant with 80+ tools for blog posts, social media, emails, and ad copy generation.

item.title: Mootion â€” Lifetime License - $79
item.description: Pay $79 once vs. $30/mo for Pictory — turn blogs into videos with no subscription AI video creation platform that turns blog posts and articles into animated videos automatically.

item.title: Sociamonials â€” Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $50/mo for Hootsuite — schedule social media forever Social media management and analytics tool with scheduling, reporting, and QR code generation.

item.title: AdGuard â€” Lifetime Subscription - $11
item.description: Pay $11 once vs. $40/yr for uBlock Origin premium — lifetime ad blocking Ad-blocker and privacy protection suite with DNS filtering, tracking prevention, and multi-platform support.

item.title: FastestVPN â€” Lifetime Subscription (10 Devices) - $29.99
item.description: Pay $30 once vs. $12/mo for NordVPN — 10-device VPN for life VPN with 250+ servers in 50+ countries, ad-blocker, malware protection, and NAT firewall for 10 devices.

item.title: Sticky Password Premium â€” Lifetime Subscription - $29.99
item.description: Pay $30 once vs. $35/yr for 1Password — password manager at 90% off Password manager with biometric login, cloud sync, form filling, and secure sharing across unlimited devices.

item.title: AiAssistWorks Plus â€” Lifetime Plan - $29.99
item.description: Pay $30 once vs. $20/mo for ChatGPT Plus — AI assistant without monthly fees AI-powered business assistant for content creation, data analysis, image generation, and task automation.

item.title: ChatPlayGround AI â€” Lifetime License - $39
item.description: Pay $39 once vs. $20/mo for ChatGPT — compare GPT-4, Claude, Gemini forever Multi-model AI chat interface that lets you compare responses from GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, and other models.

item.title: 1minAI â€” Lifetime License - $39
item.description: Pay $39 once vs. $40/mo for Midjourney — GPT-4 + image gen in one lifetime deal All-in-one AI toolkit with GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, and DALL-E in one subscription.

item.title: Polypane â€” Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $15/mo for BrowserStack — responsive design testing without subscription Specialized browser for responsive design and web development with multi-viewport preview and accessibility audit.

item.title: Support Board â€” Lifetime License - $69.99
item.description: Pay $70 once vs. $30/mo for Intercom — self-hosted live chat with AI replies Self-hosted live chat and customer support ticket system with AI auto-replies and multi-channel integration.

item.title: Axeptio â€” Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $30/mo for Cookiebot — GDPR consent management at half the cost GDPR/CCPA consent management platform with customizable cookie banners, consent logs, and compliance workflows.

item.title: Sturppy â€” Lifetime License - $19
item.description: Pay $19 once vs. $40/mo for ProjectionHub — startup financial planning at a steal Financial planning and forecasting for startups with scenario modeling, runway tracking, and investor reports.

item.title: PayForm â€” Lifetime License - $49
item.description: Pay $49 once vs. $25/mo for Typeform — payment forms without recurring charges No-code payment form builder with Stripe/PayPal, recurring billing, invoices, and customizable checkout.

item.title: Scribable â€” Lifetime License - $29
item.description: Pay $29 once vs. $40/mo for Frase — AI SEO writing at 90% off lifetime AI-powered SEO content writer with keyword research, article generation, and WordPress publishing integration.

item.title: Xenio â€” Lifetime License - $79
item.description: Pay $79 once vs. $30/mo for Murf — voice cloning and TTS with 140+ languages AI-powered voice cloning and text-to-speech platform with 140+ languages, emotion control, and API access.

item.title: N8Nitiator â€” Lifetime 1-Click Instance - $149
item.description: Pay $149 once vs. $50/mo for Zapier — managed n8n automation at 70% off Managed n8n instance with pre-configured integrations, unlimited workflows, and isolated deployment.

item.title: GetTerms â€” Lifetime License - $79
item.description: Pay $79 once vs. $20/mo for Termly — cookie consent + policy generator for life Cookie consent, GDPR privacy policy, and terms & conditions generator with auto-updates and multi-language.

item.title: LeadLocator â€” Lifetime License - $169
item.description: Pay $169 once vs. $100/mo for Lusha — B2B lead gen tool without monthly burn B2B lead generation and prospecting tool with company database, email finder, and LinkedIn integration.

item.title: Screpy â€” Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $30/mo for Ahrefs — AI web and SEO analysis with page speed AI-powered SEO and web analysis tool with page speed tests, competitor analysis, and keyword tracking.

item.title: SenderStack â€” Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $40/mo for Mailwarm — email warm-up without subscription fees Email warm-up and deliverability tool with automated sending sequences and inbox placement monitoring.

item.title: CopyMail â€” Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $20/mo for BeeFree — drag-and-drop email templates for life Email template builder and editor with drag-and-drop design, responsive templates, and team collaboration.

item.title: Headway â€” Lifetime License - $59
item.description: Pay $59 once vs. $15/mo for Blinkist — book summaries at 70% less lifetime Book summary app with key insights from non-fiction bestsellers — personalized daily recommendations.

item.title: RocketScrape â€” Lifetime License - $69
item.description: Pay $69 once vs. $50/mo for ScrapingBee — web scraping API with no monthly cap Web scraping and data extraction tool with API access, proxy rotation, and structured JSON output.

item.title: Workiom â€” Lifetime Discount
item.description: Lifetime discount — flexible no-code project management at a fraction of Asana Flexible project management and no-code database platform with custom views, automations, and team collaboration.
